name: Chicken in Spicy Orange Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 green or red pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and debone the chicken.
2. Heat oil in a heavy skillet.
3. Combine flour, salt, pepper, and paprika; roll the chicken pieces in the mixture. Reserve any excess flour.
4. Brown the chicken in the oil.
5. Transfer to a small baking dish.
6. In the same oil, sauté onion and garlic until soft.
7. Sprinkle in any remaining flour from coating the chicken and stir to blend.
8. Stir in the chicken stock and orange juice.
9. Add green pepper, orange rind, red peppers, cumin, oregano, lemon juice, and parsley.
10. Cook until the sauce is thick and smooth. Pour over the chicken.
11. Bake, covered, at 375°F for 40 minutes.
12. Garnish with sliced oranges and parsley. This dish pairs nicely with baked barley mushrooms.
From Oliver's Cookbook for Seniors. Appeared in the Calgary Sun
